method: expert L4 label dedup: exact-duplicate label clusters adjudicated card-by-card
policy: Retired IDs preserved with merged_into and full provenance; canonical cards union merged references and record merged_labels aliases; all changes human_review_status=pending; Physical source cards untouched. Commit/push left to the user. Embedding artifacts must be regenerated for active cards before the next reliability rerun.

post_dedup_audit.interpretation: Dedup did not degrade geometry; only 2 residual guarded moves. BGE-M3 rerun recommended before publication.

revival_pass.policy: cards with an articulable subtle difference are preserved with unique labels; only verbatim or same-lineage duplicates remain merged

post_revival_audit.interpretation: After reviving 12 subtle-difference cards, the guarded audit proposes no further moves; revived cards remain at their prior placements.
